metadata.title: ELMOGPS – Smart GPS Tracking for Fleets & Vehicles
metadata.description: Premium GPS solutions for fleet management, real-time tracking, geofencing, and smart alerts. Protect and optimize your vehicles with ELMOGPS.
metadata.keywords: GPS tracking, fleet management, vehicle tracking, geofencing, GPS alerts

announcement.text: New: Real-time tracking with instant alerts —

hero.subheadline: ELMOGPS delivers intelligent, precise, real-time GPS tracking for your vehicles and fleets. Cut costs, eliminate risks, and maintain full control — everywhere, at any time.

trust.title: Trusted by Leading Companies
trust.subtitle: Businesses of all sizes choose ELMOGPS to secure and optimize their fleets

services.title: Complete GPS solutions for every need
services.subtitle: From real-time monitoring to advanced analytics, our services cover every aspect of modern fleet management.

realtime.title: Real-Time GPS Tracking
realtime.description: Locate every vehicle in your fleet with metric precision, in real time on an interactive map.

fleet.title: Fleet Management
fleet.description: Centralize supervision of all your vehicles. Optimize routes, manage costs, and improve productivity.

history.title: Trip History
history.description: Access complete travel history with trip replay, speed, stops, and durations.

geofencing.title: Geofencing & Zones
geofencing.description: Create virtual geographic zones and receive instant alerts when a vehicle enters or exits.

alerts.title: Smart Alerts
alerts.description: Alerts for speeding, unauthorized stops, out-of-hours departures, GPS disconnection, and more.

driver.title: Driver Behavior
driver.description: Analyze driving habits: harsh braking, acceleration, speeding. Reduce accidents and fuel costs.

assets.title: Asset Monitoring
assets.description: Track equipment, trailers, and valuable assets in real time. Eliminate losses and theft.

reports.title: Reports & Analytics
reports.description: Automated detailed reports: mileage, fuel consumption, driver performance, fleet costs.

features.title: The most advanced GPS technology for your fleet
features.subtitle: A unified platform that centralizes all tracking, security, and fleet optimization in one place.

precision.title: Metric Precision
precision.description: Latest-generation GPS technology for location accuracy within 2 meters.

dashboard.title: Intuitive Dashboard
dashboard.description: Clear modern interface to manage your entire fleet at a glance, on desktop and mobile.

alerts.title: Real-Time Alerts
alerts.description: Instant notifications via SMS and mobile app for every critical event.

security.title: Maximum Security
security.description: Encrypted data, secure access, GDPR compliant. Your privacy and data are fully protected.

mobile.title: Mobile App
mobile.description: Access your fleet from anywhere with our intuitive iOS and Android app.

integration.title: Easy Integrations
integration.description: Compatible with your existing systems: ERP, TMS, billing software, and more.

howItWorks.title: Up and running in 3 simple steps
howItWorks.subtitle: From installation to full fleet management, we guide you every step of the way.

install.title: Tracker Installation
install.description: Our certified technicians discreetly install the GPS unit in your vehicles. Quick installation, no disruption to your operations.

connect.title: Platform Connection
connect.description: Immediately access your ELMOGPS dashboard. View all your vehicles on a real-time map.

optimize.title: Track & Optimize
optimize.description: Analyze data, receive alerts, and continuously optimize the performance and safety of your fleet.

stats.title: Measurable results for your fleet
stats.subtitle: Our clients see significant improvements within the first few weeks.

industries.title: Solutions tailored to every industry
industries.subtitle: Whether you're an SME or a large corporation, ELMOGPS adapts to your sector and specific needs.

logistics.title: Logistics & Transport
logistics.description: Optimize deliveries, reduce delays, and improve customer satisfaction with precise real-time tracking.

delivery.title: Last-Mile Delivery
delivery.description: Efficiently manage your couriers and delivery drivers. Accurate ETA, proof of delivery, route optimization.

rental.title: Vehicle Rental
rental.description: Protect your rental fleet, monitor usage, and recover quickly in case of theft.

school.title: School Transport
school.description: Keep children safe with precise school bus tracking. Parent alerts and stop management.

corporate.title: Corporate Fleets
corporate.description: Control costs, reduce risks, and improve productivity of your corporate fleet.

security.title: Security Vehicles
security.description: Secure tracking for armored vehicles, convoys, and high-value assets. Integrated panic button alerts.

construction.title: Construction & BTP
construction.description: Geolocate your construction equipment, prevent theft, and optimize on-site utilization.

field.title: Field Operations
field.description: Optimize your field team assignments, reduce unnecessary mileage, improve response times.

tracking.title: Your fleet, visible in real time
tracking.subtitle: View every vehicle on an interactive map, receive instant alerts, and access precise data at any time.

testimonials.title: What our clients say
testimonials.subtitle: Over 500 companies trust ELMOGPS to manage their fleets with precision and efficiency.

items.name: Karim B.
items.content: ELMOGPS transformed our fleet management. We reduced fuel consumption by 22% in 3 months and our drivers arrive on time. The interface is perfectly intuitive.

items.name: Sophia M.
items.content: Real-time tracking and instant alerts changed everything for our team. We always know exactly where every vehicle is. ELMOGPS support is responsive and professional.

items.name: Ahmed L.
items.content: For our rental business, ELMOGPS is essential. We recovered 2 stolen vehicles thanks to real-time tracking. Investment well worth it.

items.name: Marie T.
items.content: Our construction equipment is perfectly managed with ELMOGPS. Usage reports saved us over €40,000 in 6 months. Exceptional service.

faq.title: Everything you need to know
faq.subtitle: Have a question? Check our FAQ or contact our team directly.

items.question: How does GPS tracker installation work?
items.answer: Our certified technicians come to you directly. Installation is quick (30–60 minutes per vehicle), discreet, and without permanent vehicle modification. You're operational immediately after.

items.question: What subscription plans do you offer?
items.answer: We offer monthly and annual subscriptions with no hardware commitment. Our plans are tailored to all fleet sizes, from 1 to 1,000+ vehicles. Contact us for a personalized quote.

items.question: Is the platform accessible on mobile?
items.answer: Yes, ELMOGPS is 100% mobile accessible. We offer an intuitive iOS and Android app, as well as a responsive web interface accessible from any device.

items.question: Is my data secure?
items.answer: Absolutely. All your data is encrypted (AES-256), hosted on secure servers in Europe, and GDPR compliant. Only you and authorized users can access your information.

items.question: Do you offer technical support?
items.answer: Yes, our technical support is available 24/7 by phone, email, and chat. Our GPS experts guide you at every step, from installation to daily use.

items.question: Can I manage multiple vehicles on one platform?
items.answer: Yes, our platform is designed to manage from 1 to thousands of vehicles from a single dashboard. Create groups, assign zones, and manage your drivers easily.
